paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.58, representing a decrease of 1.05% from the prior close and 24.28% over the last 21 trading sessions. There have been no new news headlines in the last 24 hours.

The recent SEC filings include several 8-K forms, with the most recent being an 8-K/A form filed on July 21, 2026, which discloses the resignation of director Miles Everson and includes a response letter from Everson. Other recent filings include an 8-K form filed on July 15, 2026, which announces the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031.

There have been 4 new social posts in the last 24 hours, with samples including announcements about Fermi's receipt of Siemens turbines and OpenAI's investment in Georgia. The company has also had 1 Form 4 filing, indicating insider activity, and a total of 25 filings in the feed, including 17 proxy solicitation filings.
